testcase.name: test_add_item_updates_cart_badge
testcase.system-out: SETUP test_add_item_updates_cart_badge Added Sauce Labs Backpack — badge: '1' assert '1' == '1' -- PASSED TEARDOWN test_add_item_updates_cart_badge

testcase.name: test_remove_item_decrements_cart_badge
testcase.system-out: Added Backpack (1) and Bike Light (2) Removed Bike Light — badge should be 1
testcase.failure:
def test_remove_item_decrements_cart_badge(logged_in_driver): ... > assert badge == "1" E AssertionError: assert '2' == '1' Remove button click may not have propagated
tests/test_cart.py:39: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_cart_page_shows_correct_price
testcase.system-out: Cart page price for Sauce Labs Backpack: '$29.99' -- PASSED

testcase.name: test_valid_credentials_redirect_to_inventory
testcase.system-out: Login with standard_user successful — URL: https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html

testcase.name: test_locked_out_user_sees_error
testcase.system-out: Error text: 'Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out.' -- PASSED

skipped.message: @pytest.mark.skip: error text assertion updated in conftest v2.1 — test needs refresh
